name: Tuna Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ozs low-fat cream of mushroom soup
12 1/4 ozs tuna in water, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a 12-inch skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Then, cook onions and bell peppers until tender. Add soup, cheddar cheese, yogurt, crushed red pepper, black pepper, macaroni shells, and tuna just until combined. Pour the entire mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish. Meanwhile, combine bread crumbs and Parmesan cheese. Sprinkle on top of the vegetable mixture. Bake for 30 minutes.
